name: Tooltip
purpose: Brief on-hover explanation for icons, truncated values, predicates, and provenance hints.

structures.name: Text Tooltip
structures.notes: Dark popover surface with small arrow; max width keeps copy to two lines.

structures.name: Title + Detail
structures.notes: Used to explain a bare predicate or metric with one supporting line.

structures.name: Key-Value Tooltip
structures.notes: Compact provenance hint: source, captured time, version.

interactionNotes: Tooltip is supplementary, never the only place for critical info.
Use the popover token surface inverted for contrast; keep arrow aligned to trigger center.
